name: Software Team
description: A standard software development team with PM, frontend, backend, and QA agents.

agents.name: Product Manager
agents.title: Product Manager
agents.capabilities: Requirements gathering, backlog prioritization, sprint planning, stakeholder communication

agents.name: Frontend Engineer
agents.title: Frontend Engineer
agents.capabilities: React, TypeScript, CSS, UI components, accessibility, responsive design

agents.name: Backend Engineer
agents.title: Backend Engineer
agents.capabilities: Node.js, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, REST APIs, system design, performance optimization

agents.name: QA Engineer
agents.title: QA Engineer
agents.capabilities: Test planning, automated testing, regression testing, bug triage, quality metrics

goals.title: Deliver high-quality software on schedule
goals.description: Ensure the team ships features that meet requirements with minimal defects.

goals.title: Maintain code quality standards
goals.description: Keep test coverage high and technical debt manageable.
